Document:
# Utility Surgeries
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Surgery"]
Utility surgeries handle common medical procedures that do not involve organ or part transplantation — wound care, cavity work, and restorative techniques that every field medic should know.
## Tend Wounds
Tend Wounds heals brute or burn damage directly without requiring topical treatments. It is most effective on heavily damaged patients and can bring otherwise unsalvageable cases back from the brink.
[bold]Procedure:[/bold]
Open an incision on the damaged body part using a [bold]Scalpel[/bold].
Apply a [bold]Hemostat[/bold] to the incision repeatedly until the part is fully healed.
Close the incision with a [bold]Cautery[/bold].
## Cavity Implant
Cavity Implant surgery embeds a Tiny or Small item into a patient's torso. The patient cannot normally access the implanted item through standard inventory interaction.
[bold]Procedure:[/bold]
Open an incision on the torso using a [bold]Scalpel[/bold].
Open the ribcage with a [bold]Retractor[/bold].
Insert the item to be implanted.
Close the ribcage and incision with a [bold]Cautery[/bold].
Uses include concealing important items from searches, such as critical documents or the Nuclear Authentication Disk.
